title: P1-05: Add HttpOnly flag check for session cookies
acceptance_criteria: Session cookies (matched by the existing looksLikeSessionCookie() helper) that have httpOnly === false emit a finding with severity=HIGH, moduleId='P1-05', category='Cookie & Storage Hygiene'.
Session cookies with httpOnly === true do NOT emit an HttpOnly finding.
Non-session cookies missing HttpOnly do NOT emit a finding (only session cookies are in scope).
The new check mirrors the structural pattern of the existing Secure-flag check (lines 19-41 of p1-05-cookies.ts): same filter pattern, same finding shape, severity HIGH.
The fixAiPrompt for the new finding references adding httpOnly: true alongside the existing secure and sameSite attributes.

A comment notes the known limitation: __Secure-/__Host- prefixed NextAuth cookies are not matched by looksLikeSessionCookie() — this is a pre-existing blind spot, do NOT modify tools/cookies.ts to fix it in this task.
Existing tests for Secure-flag and SameSite checks still pass unchanged.
New tests added covering: (a) session cookie with httpOnly=false → finding, (b) session cookie with httpOnly=true → no finding, (c) non-session cookie with httpOnly=false → no finding.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
